ONT_sim

Mona Taouk

2025-12-09

ggplot(data, aes(x = read_length, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(weight = read_length), binwidth = 1000, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0, 100000)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Read length (bp)",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read length distribution per simulation tool") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Removed 166 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_bin()`).
## Warning: Removed 14 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_bar()`).

ggplot(data, aes(x = actual_identity, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.01, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, limits = c(0.6, 1)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Percentage identity",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Read identities") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
## Warning: Removed 504170 rows containing non-finite outside the scale range
## (`stat_bin()`).
## Warning: Removed 14 rows containing missing values or values outside the scale range
## (`geom_bar()`).

ggplot(data, aes(x = mean_qscore, fill = tool)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, alpha = 0.8, position = "identity") +
  facet_wrap(~tool, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(x = "Q-score",
    y = "Count",
    title = "Q-score") +
  theme(legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
